news.title: Rupee weakens to two-month low as oil climbs; state-run banks cushion
news.description: The Indian rupee reached its weakest point in two months on Monday.  Rising oil prices and Middle East hostilities pressured the currency's value.  State-run banks sold dollars, which helped to moderate the rupee's decline.  Higher crude prices can create macroeconomic turbulence for India's economy
